description: Read-only context gathering does not require a separate approval beyond the developer request.
Proposal writing remains read-only and stops before protected synchronization.
Developer approval is required before syncing planned requirements, specification, plan, tracker, and handoff.
Developer approval is required before runtime implementation, especially owner-layer, hook, CI, or skill changes.
Focused and medium checks may run when required by the changed scope.
Heavy aggregate proof, PR CI, and merge preparation require the release-gate phase or explicit developer approval.
Merge, main CI waiting, local/remote sync, and any cleanup execution require explicit developer approval.
